_comment: Manual JIRA-epic → allmoxy_customer_id overrides for implementation epics whose summary doesn't auto-match the customer roster by name. Keyed by epic key (e.g. 'IPA-504'). Set value to the allmoxy_customer_id. build_implementation.mjs reads this; check public/snapshots/implementation.json -> unmatched_jira_epics after a build to find candidates.
